_comment: REFERENCE TEMPLATE -- JetBrains Junie project-level MCP config. Junie reads this from .junie/mcp/mcp.json at the project root (commit & share with the team). User-scope servers go in ~/.junie/ / the IDE MCP Settings panel instead. The Action Allowlist (IDE settings) authorizes Junie to run MCP tools without per-call confirmation.
